correctness.reasoning: All features implemented correctly: editable goals with persistence via goalsStore.updateGoals(), weekly statistics calculated using getWeeklyStats() utility that queries diaryRepository, proper validation and error handling throughout.

completeness.reasoning: All requirements fully implemented: 1) Obiettivi Giornalieri card with editable fields and Salva button, 2) Statistiche Settimana card with 7-day bar chart and average calculation, 3) Info section with app version and database reset. Italian labels used throughout.

code_quality.reasoning: Excellent code quality: proper TypeScript types, comprehensive error handling with try-catch blocks, clean component structure with separated concerns, efficient state management with Zustand, loading states and user feedback via alerts, proper validation of input values.

edge_cases.reasoning: Edge cases handled properly: validation prevents zero/negative values for goals, error handling in getWeeklyStats returns zero totals on failure, database reset has confirmation dialog, loading states prevent race conditions, editing state management prevents data loss on cancel.

summary: Implementation complete. All acceptance criteria met with excellent code quality.
